item.title: RT by @nono2357: And Meshcore is pretty much broken atm.: - Weak encryption (no nonce, padding, chaining) - Weaknesses in integrity and authenticity (16-bit MAC brute-forceable in 4 days) - Poor devel
item.description: pAnd Meshcore is pretty much broken atm.:br /- Weak encryption (no nonce, padding, chaining)br /- Weaknesses in integrity and authenticity (16-bit MAC brute-forceable in 4 days)br /- Poor development practices (silent fixes, no warnings to users)br /a href="https://alainx277.com/posts/meshcores-prob

I see it often looping in thoughts even though I gave it exactly as per the full chain (oEmbed write) a href="https://github.com/dinosn/wp2shell-lab"github.com/dinosn/wp2shell-l…/a
